summary: Phase 7C Forecasting backend: 21/21 pytest pass (100%). All endpoints verified: /methods, /sales (default+linear+ewma+hybrid+per-outlet+months=6), /expense, /dashboard. Math correctness verified (forecast_total == sum forecast_daily). Auth gate, ValidationError->400, FastAPI Query 422 all confirmed. Phase 7B regression light-tested (vendor-scorecard, pivot, comparatives, builder/run, finance/* endpoints) all 200. Frontend /finance/forecasting renders with all required data-testids (KPIs, chart SVG, method+months toggles, target/outlet/history-days controls, method-comparison panel, per-outlet table with 4 outlets, month-bars). Method switching, months switching, and outlet switching all reload data correctly. ONE real frontend bug found: React duplicate key warning ('2026-04') — MonthlyBars uses period as key but the same month appears in both monthly_history (last) and monthly_forecast (first) causing key+testid collision.

ui_bugs.issue: React duplicate key warning ('Encountered two children with the same key, 2026-04') because both monthly_history[last] and monthly_forecast[0] share the same period (current month). Same collision affects data-testid='month-bar-2026-04'. Fires repeatedly on every render.

passed_tests_backend: GET /api/forecasting/methods returns {linear, ewma, hybrid} and {sales, expense}
GET /api/forecasting/sales (default) returns full payload with all 10 keys + comparison_methods{linear,ewma,hybrid}, method='hybrid'
GET /api/forecasting/dashboard returns consolidated{} + outlets[4] with growth_pct + accuracy_mape per outlet
passed_tests_frontend: All 4 KPI cards present with values: History 90d Rp 2.581.214.000, Forecast 3M Rp 5.341.498.987, Growth +106.94%, Backtest Accuracy 41.57% (Volatile)
SVG chart [data-testid=forecast-chart] renders with history line, dashed forecast line, confidence band, 'today' vertical marker
Method toggles (linear/ewma/hybrid) present with active state, click triggers reload
Outlet dropdown options: ['Consolidated (All)','Altero','Calluna','De La Sol','Rucker Park'] - switching to single outlet hides per-outlet table (rows: 4 -> 0)
Method comparison panel shows all 3 methods (forecast-compare-{linear,ewma,hybrid})
Per-outlet table renders 4 outlet-row-* in consolidated view
MonthlyBars renders 7 month-bar-* elements (3M default + 90d history + month boundary)
action_items: MEDIUM: Fix React duplicate key warning in /app/frontend/src/portals/finance/Forecasting.jsx line 463 — change `key={r.period}` and `data-testid` to include r.type prefix, e.g. key={`${r.type}-${r.period}`} and data-testid={`month-bar-${r.type}-${r.period}`}. Same period (current month) appears in both monthly_history and monthly_forecast.
LOW: MAPE around 41% labeled 'Volatile' — informational only per spec, NOT a bug. Demo data has ramp-up bias from seed.
critical_code_review_comments: forecasting_service.py: clamp `forecast_vals = [max(0.0, v) for v in forecast_vals]` is applied to displayed daily forecast but `totals.forecast_total = round(sum(forecast_vals), 2)` matches that clamped list — OK.

forecasting_service.py: `growth_pct = (sum(forecast_vals) - sum(values)) / sum(values) * 100` compares ~93 forecast_days vs 91 history_days — slight horizon mismatch can inflate growth%. Acceptable for MVP analytics, but consider normalizing to per-day or matching window for fairer comparison.
forecasting_service.py forecast_dashboard: when an outlet forecast errors out, it's silently skipped (`except Exception: continue`) which can mask bugs — consider logging.

forecasting_service.py: `forecast_days = months * 31` over-shoots short months; the trimming via `monthly_forecast_full[:months]` works but daily forecast list extends ~3 days beyond last reported month. Cosmetic only.
forecasting.py router: permissions `executive.dashboard.read` OR `finance.report.profit_loss` — Super Admin verified, but non-finance/non-exec users would 403 (acceptable per spec).
Forecasting.jsx MonthlyBars (line 460-475): uses `r.period` as both React key AND data-testid; collides when current month appears in both history and forecast arrays.
Forecasting.jsx file is large (487 lines) but cohesive; below 700-line guideline.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_phase7c_forecasting.py (new — 21 tests covering Phase 7C + light Phase 7B/4-6 regression)

success_rate.frontend: 92% (all required test IDs and flows work; one React duplicate-key console warning)

seed_data_creation: None created. Existing seed_phase7b_demo data (240 daily_sales validated, 480 journal entries) used; produced consolidated history Rp 2.58B, forecast 3M Rp 5.34B, hybrid MAPE 41.57%.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 7C is fully functional end-to-end. Backend 21/21 pass. Only outstanding item is a frontend React duplicate-key warning in MonthlyBars when the current month appears in both monthly_history and monthly_forecast (e.g. '2026-04' shows in both). Fix is a 1-line key change in Forecasting.jsx line 463. ValidationError -> 400 mapping (carried fix from iteration_2) is verified working for /api/forecasting/sales?method=bogus.
rca_of_react_warning: monthly_history (last 6 months) and monthly_forecast (next 3 months) both include the current calendar month period (e.g. '2026-04') because monthly_history aggregates partial current month from filled history dates ending at today, and forecast_daily starts at today+1 within the same month. MonthlyBars concatenates both arrays and uses {r.period} as React key; React detects collision. Fix: include r.type in key and testid.
